02 · Performance map

Strength versus precision.

The strongest models combine a high benchmark rating with a low ACPL. The chart uses a logarithmic precision scale so the full field remains readable.

Better play moves up and right.

Horizontal position shows benchmark ELO. Vertical position shows move accuracy, with lower ACPL placed higher. Filter the leaderboard above and the map updates with it.

03 · Methodology

A narrow benchmark with clear signals.

ChessBench focuses on one demanding environment rather than combining unrelated tasks into a single score.

01

Complete games

Models are evaluated over full games, so planning, tactical calculation, recovery and consistency all affect the result.

02

Move-by-move evaluation

Stockfish reviews each decision. Average centipawn loss quantifies how much value a model gives away compared with stronger engine choices.

03

Field-relative rating

Benchmark ELO is calculated within the ChessBench field. It describes performance among these models and is not presented as a direct human chess rating.

Measuring how AI models understand and play chess.

ChessBench · benchmark field
